cases.title: Check-in window validator permits time within configured open-close bounds
preconditions: Event rule config defines checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt with openAt < closeAt
Fixed clock now set to a time between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt per testing plan deterministic controls
steps: Call check-in window validator (e.g. isWithinCheckinWindow(openAt, closeAt, now) or assertCheckinWindowOpen) with in-window now
cases.expected: Validator returns true (or does not throw), permitting check-in processing per FR-15 and BR-10

cases.title: Check-in module persists staff check-in only when current time is inside configured window
preconditions: Event is InProgress with check-in window active (now between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff assigned to the event
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext) at fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state
cases.expected: CheckinRecord persisted with non-null checkinAt; registration transitions to CheckedIn; window validation passed before persist per check-in validation pipeline step 2

cases.title: Check-in module persists self check-in only when current time is inside configured window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event is InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated participant actor context
steps: Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext) at fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state
cases.expected: CheckinRecord persisted with non-null checkinAt and method Self; registration transitions to CheckedIn; same window rule enforced for self-service path

cases.title: In-window check-in via API stores timestamp for staff and self endpoints
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with check-in window containing simulated current time
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Self check-in enabled on event rule config
Staff JWT and participant JWT available
Fresh Idempotency-Key per request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff token and registrationId while in window
Reset fixture or use second participant; POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant token while in window
cases.expected: Both endpoints return HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt and CheckedIn registrationState when window is open; satisfies AC-05 in-window recording for both check-in channels

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in attempt does not create CheckinRecord for staff or self
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window not containing fixed clock now
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Self check-in enabled where self path is tested
steps: Set fixed clock strictly before checkinOpenAt or after checkinCloseAt
Attempt staff check-in via checkinService.staffCheckin
Attempt self check-in via checkinService.selfCheckin on a separate fixture participant
Query checkin_records for both registrations
cases.expected: Both attempts fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; zero CheckinRecord rows created; registrations remain Registered per FR-15 only-records-valid-in-window rule

cases.title: validCheckin state transition guard requires check-in window to be open
preconditions: Registration in Registered state with no prior valid check-in
Event config with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set outside the configured window
steps: Evaluate validCheckin guard (per state machine transition Registered -> CheckedIn) with out-of-window now
cases.expected: Guard fails; transition to CheckedIn is blocked; aligns with state machine guard validCheckin: check-in window valid + no prior valid check-in

cases.title: Window validator rejects time strictly before checkinOpenAt
preconditions: Configured checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt with openAt < closeAt
Fixed clock now set to one instant before checkinOpenAt
steps: Call check-in window validator with now before open boundary
cases.expected: Validator fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; check-in processing blocked per BR-10

cases.title: Window validator rejects time strictly after checkinCloseAt
preconditions: Configured checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock now set to one instant after checkinCloseAt
steps: Call check-in window validator with now after close boundary
cases.expected: Validator fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; late check-in is not recorded

cases.title: Check-in at checkinOpenAt boundary instant is recorded when open boundary is inclusive
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinOpenAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the open boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds per configured window policy; checkinAt persisted and registration is CheckedIn

cases.title: Check-in at checkinCloseAt boundary instant is rejected when close boundary is exclusive
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the close boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED per system-overview strictly-inside window semantics; registration stays Registered

cases.title: Rejected out-of-window check-in leaves no valid record for attendance reconciliation
preconditions: Event InProgress with closed check-in window (now after checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant never checked in
Event completion workflow available in test harness
steps: Attempt and fail check-in outside window
Complete event and run attendance finalization
Inspect registration terminal state
cases.expected: No valid CheckinRecord exists; participant without in-window check-in is marked Absent after completion, not Attended per BR-12

cases.title: Concurrent out-of-window check-in requests all fail without creating records
preconditions: Registered participant with no prior check-in
Check-in window closed (fixed clock outside bounds)
Two or more parallel check-in API requests for the same registrationId
steps: Fire concurrent POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins (or self-checkin) calls while window is closed
Count checkin_records rows and inspect registration state after all requests settle
cases.expected: All requests fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; zero CheckinRecord rows created; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Window validation runs before duplicate-check-in check in check-in pipeline
preconditions: Check-in validation pipeline order: auth, event check-in window, existing valid check-in check, persist
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Fixed clock outside check-in window
steps: Attempt check-in with out-of-window now
Inspect error code returned
cases.expected: Failure is CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED (not CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED); window rule evaluated at pipeline step 2 before duplicate check at step 3

cases.title: Check-in UI reflects window availability for staff and participant flows
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window currently closed
OrganizerStaff logged in with event scope and Registered participant visible in console
Participant logged in with Registered status where self check-in is enabled
steps: Open organizer check-in console and attempt staff check-in for a registered participant
Navigate participant self check-in page and attempt or observe check-in control state
Observe messaging and participant checked-in status
cases.expected: Both UIs communicate check-in unavailable with window-closed or not-yet-open reason; no success timestamp displayed; participants remain not checked in

cases.title: Fixed clock abstraction yields deterministic window validation outcomes
preconditions: Test harness uses injectable fixed clock per testing plan section 7
Same event window config and identical now instant across runs
steps: Set clock to identical out-of-window instant
Run check-in window validator twice with same inputs
Set clock to identical in-window instant and run validator twice
cases.expected: Out-of-window runs both fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; in-window runs both succeed; no flakiness from wall-clock drift

cases.title: CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED error includes configured window bounds in details
preconditions: Event with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt ISO timestamps
Out-of-window check-in attempt via staff or self API endpoint
steps: POST check-in endpoint outside configured window
Inspect error.error.details in response envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 422 (or 409) with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED, user-safe message, and details containing checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt per error-handling contract

cases.title: Failed window validation does not partially persist CheckinRecord or transition registration
preconditions: Database transaction boundary for check-in module validates window before persist
Registered participant with no prior check-in and closed check-in window
steps: Attempt out-of-window check-in that fails at window validation step
Query checkin_records and registration state in same database session
cases.expected: No orphaned CheckinRecord and no registration state change; transaction rolled back preserving check-in module invariants

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in failure is logged with requestId and CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED for diagnostics
preconditions: API server logging enabled in test environment
Out-of-window check-in request producing traceable requestId in error response
steps: POST check-in outside configured window
Correlate response error.requestId with server log entry
cases.expected: Log entry includes requestId, errorCode CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED, eventId/registrationId context, and actorId when authenticated

cases.title: Idempotent retry while window remains closed does not record check-in
preconditions: Registered participant with check-in window closed
Fixed Idempotency-Key header value for check-in write endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with Idempotency-Key K; receive CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED failure
Repeat POST with same Idempotency-Key K while window remains closed
cases.expected: Both responses fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord created; time-window policy requires user action rather than blind retry success per error-handling retry policy
